title: Product Fields
description: Import-safe update of the existing Product Fields group with SEO and long-form content fields.

title: Home - Hero Section
description: Front-page fields. The location rule is set to the configured front page instead of a fixed page ID.

title: Hero Slide Fields
description: Existing hero slide fields preserved for direct import.

title: Product Category Fields
description: Adds the missing official name_th field and SEO extensions while preserving current keys.

title: Why Fields
description: Existing Why fields plus optional localized image alt fields.

title: Company Fields
description: Company singleton fields preserved for direct import.

title: About Fields
description: Preserves current About fields and fixes the duplicate hero_image_1_alt_en field by converting the second copy into hero_image_2_alt_en.

title: Article Fields
description: Extends the current bilingual article model with author, FAQ, localized focus keywords, OG, and robots fields.
